title: Amtech - Claw Hammer, Strong Fibreglass Shaft, Shock Absorbing Handle, Non-Slip Grip, Lightweight for Everyday DIY Tasks (8oz / 225g)
features: LIGHTWEIGHT 8oz (225g) DESIGN: Perfect for smaller projects, offering precision and control where a heavier hammer is not required.
DURABLE STEEL SHAFT: Provides long-lasting strength and resilience, built to handle everyday DIY jobs.
COMFORT GRIP HANDLE: Helps reduce hand fatigue and ensures secure handling for more accurate strikes.
MULTI-PURPOSE CLAW: Drives nails with ease while the claw end removes them cleanly, increasing efficiency.
IDEAL FOR LIGHT DUTY TASKS: Great for picture hanging, craft work, and household repairs.
description: From the manufacturer 8oz claw hammer – fibreglass shaft Drop forged, hardened and tempered polished head Fibre glass shaft with rubber grip Claw hammer for pulling nails or nail removal See More
